creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #7)

> b) _never_ reproducible when the guest is limited to 
>    one (1) processor, or booted in safe mode

Hint: 

kern.smp.disabled=1

𡀓– in /etc/sysctl.conf then restart the guest. 

(More streamlined than stopping the guest, setting the equivalent limitation in the VirtualBox GUI then starting the guest.)
